# anti-hall

> A Claude Code marketplace + plugin that makes Claude Code verify before it claims.
> It injects a verify-first protocol at session start, a short rotating nudge every
> turn, and mechanical guards (no AI commit self-credit, no silent force-push, no
> dropped tasks), plus four workflow skills. All hooks are pure Node.js and the one
> prerequisite is Node >= 18 on PATH.

anti-hall targets four failure modes of coding assistants: eagerness (acting before
investigating), hallucination (stating unverified facts as truth), fix-before-diagnosis
(fixing before proving root cause), and fake completion (claiming done without running
the check).

## Install

```
/plugin marketplace add talas9/anti-hall
/plugin install anti-hall@anti-hall
```

Requires Node.js >= 18 on PATH; without it the hooks silently no-op.

## Overview

- [README](README.md): top-level overview, problem statement, quickstart, layout.
- [Plugin README](plugins/anti-hall/README.md): full component reference, how-it-works, configuration, troubleshooting, contributing.
- [CHANGELOG](CHANGELOG.md): version history (current: 0.3.5).
- [AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md): prose mirror of the verify-first Iron Law for Codex / cross-tool agents (repo root; not bundled by /plugin install).
- [docs/KB-claude-codex.md](docs/KB-claude-codex.md): knowledge base on Claude Code hook contracts and prompting that the design relies on.

## Hooks (plugins/anti-hall/hooks/)

- [verify-first-full.js](plugins/anti-hall/hooks/verify-first-full.js): SessionStart — full Iron-Law + rationalization-table protocol + skill primer; re-fires after compaction (source=compact).
- [verify-first.js](plugins/anti-hall/hooks/verify-first.js): UserPromptSubmit — short varying one-line nudge (hash of full stdin envelope).
- [git-guard.js](plugins/anti-hall/hooks/git-guard.js): PreToolUse on Bash — quote-aware tokenizer blocks AI self-credit commit trailers and git push --force.
- [task-tracker.js](plugins/anti-hall/hooks/task-tracker.js): UserPromptSubmit — task-list discipline directive.
- [task-guard.js](plugins/anti-hall/hooks/task-guard.js): Stop (loop-safe) — blocks once when the session ends with open tasks.
- [graphify-session.js](plugins/anti-hall/hooks/graphify-session.js): SessionStart — primes query-the-graph-first when a graph exists.
- [graphify-reminder.js](plugins/anti-hall/hooks/graphify-reminder.js): Stop — one-time reminder to update the graph after real edits.
- [hooks.json](plugins/anti-hall/hooks/hooks.json): hook registration manifest.

## Skills (plugins/anti-hall/skills/)

Invoke as /anti-hall:<name>.

- [root-cause](plugins/anti-hall/skills/root-cause/SKILL.md): evidence-driven debugging to the original + root cause.
- [orchestration](plugins/anti-hall/skills/orchestration/SKILL.md): non-blocking swarm; Claude+Codex load split; commands via Haiku.
- [feature-launch](plugins/anti-hall/skills/feature-launch/SKILL.md): plan-first, deadly-loop-hardened, scenario-simulated feature protocol.
- [deadly-loop](plugins/anti-hall/skills/deadly-loop/SKILL.md): iterative Reviewer + Critic debate + fix-waves until convergence.
- [MODEL-POLICY.md](plugins/anti-hall/skills/MODEL-POLICY.md): shared model roster (triplicated across skill references; keep in sync).

## Statusline (plugins/anti-hall/statusline/)

- [STATUSLINE.md](plugins/anti-hall/statusline/STATUSLINE.md): install + revert.
- [install-statusline.js](plugins/anti-hall/statusline/install-statusline.js): Node installer.
- Dispatcher [statusline.js](plugins/anti-hall/statusline/statusline.js) selects [statusline-monorepo.js](plugins/anti-hall/statusline/statusline-monorepo.js) or [statusline-simple.js](plugins/anti-hall/statusline/statusline-simple.js).

## Manifests

- [plugins/anti-hall/.claude-plugin/plugin.json](plugins/anti-hall/.claude-plugin/plugin.json): plugin manifest; version is the sole authority.
- [.claude-plugin/marketplace.json](.claude-plugin/marketplace.json): marketplace manifest.

## Read more

Start with [README.md](README.md), then [plugins/anti-hall/README.md](plugins/anti-hall/README.md)
for depth. The design rationale (hook contracts, primacy/recency, anti-habituation)
is in [docs/KB-claude-codex.md](docs/KB-claude-codex.md).
